componentDescription: A customizable interactive element used to trigger actions or navigate users.

children.description: Optional React node(s) to be displayed as the button's content.

to.description: Optional LoaderProps object to configure the appearance and behavior of the loader animation.

isLoading.description: Optional LoaderPosition to determine the location of the loader animation relative to the button content.

loaderProps.description: Optional React node(s) defining the icon to be displayed within the button.

loaderPosition.description: Optional IconPosition to specify the icon placement inside the button relative to text.

icon.description: Optional boolean to indicate if the button is non-interactive/disabled.

iconPosition.description: Optional boolean to control the fill property of the button, affecting its style.

isDisabled.description: Optional boolean indicating if the button size should automatically adjust to its content.

isFilled.description: Optional boolean that adds a rounded style to the icon if present.

isAuto.description: Optional function that will be called when the button is clicked.

isIconRounded.description: Optional Size to specify the size of the button.

onClick.description: Optional shadow property that can be a predefined Shadow, Elevation value or custom CSSProperties to apply shadow effects to the button.

size.description: Optional Shape to specify the shape of the button (e.g., rounded or square edges).

shadow.description: Optional string used as an accessible label for screen readers.

shape.description: Optional Variant to define the stylistic variation of the button.

ariaLabel.description: Optional effect to apply interactive effects (e.g., ripple) to the button.

variant.description: Variant to define the stylistic variation of the button.

animation.description: Optional animation to apply to the button

color.description: Main color for the button (accepts theme tokens like 'theme-primary' or color palette like 'color-blue-600')

reversed.description: Whether to reverse the colors (useful for dark backgrounds)

views.type: { container?: ViewProps; content?: ViewProps; loader?: ViewProps; icon?: ViewProps; link?: ViewProps; }
